---
title: "NEJM Case Record 教學講義"
subtitle: "NEJM Case 3-2025"
author: "謝慕揚 MD, PhD, FESC"
date: 2026-01-03
lang: zh-TW
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
Case Records of the Massachusetts General
Hospital
Case 3-2025: A 54-Year-Old Man with Exertional
Dyspnea and Chest Pain
54 歲男性，運動性呼吸困難與胸痛
N Engl J Med 2025;392:383-94 | January 23, 2025
謝慕揚, MD, PhD, FESC 整理
2026-01-03
1 病例呈現(Case Presentation)
1.1 主訴與現病史(Chief Complaint and HPI)
A 54-year-old male athlete was evaluated in the cardiovascular performance program clinic
because of progressive exertional dyspnea and chest pain. 一位54 歲男性運動員因漸進性運動性呼吸困難與胸痛至心血管功能門診就診。 The patient had been in his usual state of health, including engaging in regular vigorous
exercise, until 17 months before the current presentation, when intermittent nonradiating
chest pressure and dyspnea on exertion developed. He felt unable to ”get a full breath” during
high-intensity aerobic exercise. 病患原本健康狀態良好，有規律激烈運動習慣，直到就診前17 個月開始出現間歇性、無
放射性的胸悶及運動性呼吸困難。他在高強度有氧運動時感覺無法「深吸一口氣」。 Timeline of Symptoms (症狀時間軸):
• 5 years before presentation: Episode of dull left-sided chest pain lasting 2 days after airline
travel; troponin normal, ECG showed sinus bradycardia, coronary CTA showed CAD-RADS
0, calcium score 0
• 17 months before: Onset of intermittent chest pressure and dyspnea on exertion
• 16 months before: PCP evaluation — new grade 2/6 midsystolic murmur, ECG showed new
rightward axis, reduced R-wave progression, new inferolateral T-wave inversions
• 16 months before (10 days later): Stress echocardiography — T-wave inversions at rest,
hyperdynamic LV with mild MR, 2mm ST depressions with exercise
• 14 months before: Cardiology evaluation — cardiac MRI showing concentric LV wall thick-
ening up to 18mm, late gadolinium enhancement 3% of myocardium
• Current presentation: Cardiovascular performance program for CPET


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
1.2 過去病史與社會史(Past Medical and Social History)
• Arthritis
• Bilateral rotator cuff repairs（雙側旋轉肌袖修補手術）
• Bilateral meniscectomies（雙側半月板切除術）
• Colonic polyps（大腸息肉）
• Medications: Aspirin only
• Occupation: Executive（企業主管）
• Social: Lives in suburban New England with family; social alcohol use; remote intranasal
cocaine use; never smoked
• Not vaccinated against SARS-CoV-2
1.3 家族史(Family History)
• Father: Premature coronary artery disease and heart failure
• Mother: Hypertension, atrial fibrillation, and heart failure
• Multiple relatives: Dyslipidemia
1.4 身體檢查(Physical Examination)
Examination
Findings
Heart rate
81 beats per minute
Blood pressure
116/70 mm Hg
Jugular venous pressure
13 cm H2O（升高）
Kussmaul’s sign present（庫斯莫爾徵陽性）
Skin
Small angiomas (<4 mm) on truncal skin（軀幹小血管
瘤）
Other
Normal
重點提醒
Kussmaul’s Sign（庫斯莫爾徵）：吸氣時頸靜脈壓不降反升的現象。正常情況下，吸氣
時胸內壓下降會增加靜脈回流，使頸靜脈壓下降。Kussmaul’s sign 代表右心室無法容納
增加的靜脈回流，見於：
• Right ventricular infarction（右心室梗塞）
• Constrictive pericarditis（縮窄性心包炎）
• Restrictive cardiomyopathy（限制性心肌病變）


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
1.5 檢驗數據(Laboratory Data)
Laboratory Test
Result
Reference
Range
臨床意義
Sodium
140 mmol/L
136–145
正常
Potassium
4.5 mmol/L
3.6–5.1
正常
Chloride
103 mmol/L
98–107
正常
Carbon dioxide
28 mmol/L
22–32
正常
Urea nitrogen
25 mg/dL
6–20
輕度升高
可能腎功能受損
Creatinine
1.10 mg/dL
0.60–1.30
正常
Calcium
10.6 mg/dL
8.9–10.3
輕度升高
需注意高血￿ite 症
ALT
55 U/L
10–55
正常上限
AST
53 U/L
10–40
輕度升高
Alkaline phosphatase
84 U/L
45–115
正常
Total bilirubin
0.7 mg/dL
0.0–1.0
正常
High-sensitivity Troponin
T
91 ng/L
0–9
顯著升高（10 倍）
心肌損傷指標
NT-proBNP
2099
pg/mL
<900
顯著升高
心衰竭/心肌病變指
標
Key Laboratory Findings（關鍵檢驗發現）：
High-sensitivity Troponin T 及NT-proBNP 顯著升高，提示心肌損傷及心臟壁張力增
加，強烈支持心肌病變診斷。在無明顯缺血證據下，需考慮浸潤性心肌病變（infiltrative
cardiomyopathy）。 1.6 影像學檢查(Imaging Studies)
1.6.1 Electrocardiogram (ECG)
• Sinus rhythm
• Rightward axis（右軸偏移）
• Diffuse T-wave inversions（瀰漫性T 波倒置）
• Diminished R-wave amplitudes in V1, V2, I, aVL（R 波振幅下降）
• Low voltage despite LV wall thickening（心室壁增厚但QRS 電壓下降）


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
重點提醒
ECG Clue（心電圖線索）：左心室壁增厚通常伴隨QRS 電壓增高，但此病患QRS 電
壓反而較五年前下降。這種「壁厚但電壓低」的矛盾現象（pseudo-hypertrophy pattern），
高度提示浸潤性心肌病變，特別是amyloidosis。 1.6.2 Cardiac MRI
• Concentric LV wall thickening up to 18 mm（同心性左心室壁增厚）
• Lack of tapering of wall thickness from base to apex（壁厚從基底到心尖無漸減）
• Focal late gadolinium enhancement (LGE) 3% of LV myocardium in midwall apical inter-
ventricular septum（局部延遲顯影）
• Mildly elongated anterior mitral leaflet（前瓣葉輕度延長）
• T1 mapping: 1182 msec (reference: 938–1094) — markedly elevated
1.6.3 Cardiopulmonary Exercise Testing (CPET)
• Peak work output: 213 watts (100% predicted) — normal
• Peak VO2: 19.7 mL/kg/min (59% predicted) — severely reduced
• Ventilatory threshold: 83% of peak VO2
• Impaired oxygen pulse augmentation（氧脈衝增強受損）— surrogate for stroke volume
augmentation
• Normal spirometry and oxygenation
重點提醒
CPET Interpretation：正常的最大功率輸出但嚴重降低的峰值攝氧量，在肺功能正常
的情況下，指向心血管限制（cardiovascular limitation）。氧脈衝增強受損提示運動時
心搏量無法適當增加，符合限制性生理學（restrictive physiology）。 2 醫學英文寫作解析(Medical English Writing Analysis)


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
原文例句
文法結構
中文翻譯
寫作技巧
A 54-year-old male
athlete was evaluated in
the cardiovascular
performance program
clinic because of
progressive exertional
dyspnea and chest pain. Passive voice +
because of +
noun phrase
一位54 歲男性運動
員因漸進性運動性呼
吸困難及胸痛至心血
管功能門診接受評估。 開場句使用被動語
態
強調病患而非醫師
because of 接名詞片
語
The patient had been in
his usual state of health
until 17 months before
the current presentation,
when intermittent chest
pressure developed. Past perfect +
until + time
clause + when
病患原本維持平常健
康狀態，直到就診前
17 個月開始出現間歇
性胸悶。 Past perfect 表示
「更早之前」
清楚標示症狀起始
點
He felt unable to ”get a
full breath” during
high-intensity aerobic
exercise. Subject + felt
+ adjective +
infinitive
phrase
他在高強度有氧運動
時感覺無法「深吸一
口氣」。 引用病患原話
（quotation）
增加臨床真實感
On examination, the
jugular venous pressure
was 13 cm of water, and
Kussmaul’s sign was
present. On
examination +
passive
construction
理學檢查發現頸靜脈
壓為13 公分水柱，
且庫斯莫爾徵陽性。 On examination 為
標準PE 描述起始
簡潔呈現陽性發現
These findings were
suggestive but not
diagnostic of
hypertrophic
cardiomyopathy. Subject + be
+ suggestive
but not
diagnostic of
這些發現提示但不足
以確診肥厚性心肌病
變。 表達診斷不確定性
的標準句型
留有鑑別診斷空間
Kussmaul’s sign is either
the absence of a
decrease or a
paradoxical increase in
jugular venous pressure
during inspiration. Subject + be +
either A or B
+ prepositional
phrase
庫斯莫爾徵是指吸氣
時頸靜脈壓不降或反
常上升的現象。 Either...or 結構用於
定義
清楚說明兩種可能
表現
Although a genetically
acquired hypertrophic
cardiomyopathy cannot
be definitively ruled out,
the time course of this
patient’s progressive
symptoms would be
unexpected. Although
clause + main
clause with
conditional
mood
雖然無法完全排除遺
傳性肥厚性心肌病變，
但此病患症狀進展的
時程並非典型表現。 Although 讓步子句
would be 表達推
測/懷疑
續下頁...


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
原文例句
文法結構
中文翻譯
寫作技巧
I suspect that this
patient has a progressive
symptomatic restrictive
cardiomyopathy, most
likely due to cardiac
amyloidosis. Subject +
suspect + that
clause + most
likely due to
我懷疑此病患有漸進
性症狀性限制性心肌
病變，最可能原因為
心臟類澱粉沉積症。 表達臨床推斷的標
準句型
most likely due to
表因果關係
3 鑑別診斷(Differential Diagnosis)
3.1 臨床推理過程(Clinical Reasoning)
此病患的核心問題是：一位原本高度活躍的運動員，在17 個月內出現漸進性運動耐受力下
降，伴隨：
• 左心室壁增厚（17–18 mm）
• ECG 電壓下降（與壁厚不成比例）
• Kussmaul’s sign（限制性生理學）
• 顯著升高的troponin 及NT-proBNP
• CPET 顯示心血管限制
鑑別診斷
支持證據
不支持證據
建議檢查
Differential Dx
Supporting
Against
Workup
Hypertrophic
cardiomyopa-
thy
肥厚性心肌病變
• LV wall thickening
• Elongated anterior
mitral leaflet
• Late gadolinium
enhancement
• Concentric (not
asymmetric)
• 56-gene panel
negative
• Children screening
negative
• Rapid 17-month
progression
• Low voltage on
ECG
Family screening
Repeat genetic
testing
Serial imaging
Athlete’s heart
運動員心臟
• Lifelong vigorous
exercise
• Preserved LV
function
• Wall thickness
17–18 mm (typical
athlete: 13–15 mm)
• No LV dilatation
• Symptoms with
deconditioning
• Late gadolinium
enhancement
Detraining protocol
Serial imaging
續下頁...


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
鑑別診斷
支持證據
不支持證據
建議檢查
Differential Dx
Supporting
Against
Workup
Cardiac
amyloidosis
心臟類澱粉沉積
症
• Concentric LV
thickening
• Low voltage-wall
thickness mismatch
• Kussmaul’s sign
• Bilateral rotator
cuff tears
• Elevated T1
mapping
• Biatrial
enlargement
• Elevated troponin
& NT-proBNP
• Hoarseness
• Relatively young
age
• No peripheral
neuropathy
• No carpal tunnel
syndrome
Serum free light
chains
SPEP with
immunofixation
Fat pad biopsy
Technetium
pyrophosphate scan
Cardiac
sarcoidosis
心臟結節病
• Late gadolinium
enhancement
• Hoarseness
(laryngeal
involvement)
• Arrhythmias on
Holter
• No pulmonary
involvement
• No
lymphadenopathy
mentioned
• Pattern of LGE
atypical
PET scan
Chest CT
Bronchoscopy with
BAL
Tissue biopsy
Fabry disease
乙型乙醯己糖胺
酶缺乏症
• LV wall thickening
• Small angiomas on
skin
• Male patient
(X-linked, typically
more severe and
earlier onset)
• No acroparesthesias
• No corneal changes
• Rapid progression
atypical
Alpha-galactosidase
A activity
Genetic testing
Ophthalmologic
exam
Hydroxychloroquine
cardiomyopa-
thy
羥氯奎寧心肌病
變
• Symptoms during
COVID-19 pandemic
• No history of
hydroxychloroquine
use mentioned
• No autoimmune
disease history
Detailed medication
history
Storage
diseases
儲積症
(Gaucher,
Glycogen
storage)
• LV wall thickening
• Restrictive
physiology
• No
hepatosplenomegaly
• Late age of onset
• No other systemic
features
Enzyme assays
Genetic testing


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
Key Diagnostic Clues for Cardiac Amyloidosis（心臟類澱粉沉積症關鍵線索）：
1. Low voltage-wall thickness mismatch：心室壁增厚但ECG 電壓不增反減
2. Bilateral rotator cuff tears：雙側旋轉肌袖撕裂是amyloid 沉積於韌帶的表現
3. Hoarseness：聲帶浸潤（幾乎僅見於AL amyloidosis，非ATTR）
4. Elevated T1 mapping on cardiac MRI：顯示心肌細胞外間質擴張
5. Kussmaul’s sign：限制性生理學的典型表現
4 進一步檢查結果(Additional Workup Results)
4.1 血清蛋白電泳與游離輕鏈(SPEP and Serum Free Light Chains)
Test
Result
Reference Range
Interpretation
Serum IgG
715 mg/dL
700–1600
Normal
Serum IgA
29 mg/dL
66–436
Low
Serum IgM
13 mg/dL
43–279
Low
Serum immunofixation
Monoclonal
kappa
Negative
Abnormal
Free lambda light chain
3.1 mg/L
5.7–26.3
Low
Free kappa light chain
3653.9 mg/L
3.3–19.4
極度升高
Kappa:Lambda ratio
1178.68
0.30–1.70
極度異常
重點提醒
Interpretation：Free kappa light chain 極度升高（約正常上限的190 倍），kappa:lambda
ratio 達1178，高度提示漿細胞惡性增生（plasma cell dyscrasia）產生monoclonal kappa
light chain，造成AL (light-chain) amyloidosis。 4.2 骨髓切片(Bone Marrow Biopsy)
• Slightly hypercellular marrow for age
• Atypical plasma cells with hyperchromatic nuclei: 40% of cellularity
• CD138 and MUM1 immunostaining confirmed plasma cell infiltration
• In situ hybridization: monotypic kappa expression
• FISH: t(11;14) translocation (cyclin D1:IgH fusion) — common in AL amyloidosis
• Congo red staining of bone marrow core: No amyloid deposition


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
4.3 脂肪墊切片(Fat Pad Biopsy)
• H&E staining: Eccentric thickening of vessel walls by pink, waxy substance
• Congo red staining:
– Standard light microscopy: Salmon-pink color
– Polarized light: Apple-green birefringence — diagnostic of amyloid
• Immunofluorescence: Positive for kappa light chains
• Negative for: Lambda, transthyretin, serum amyloid A, β2-microglobulin, apolipoprotein
A1, fibrinogen, IgG/IgA/IgM heavy chains
5 最終診斷(Final Diagnosis)
AL (Light-Chain) Amyloidosis
輕鏈型類澱粉沉積症
with cardiac involvement (cardiac amyloidosis)
伴隨心臟侵犯（心臟類澱粉沉積症）
Secondary to plasma cell dyscrasia with t(11;14)
續發於漿細胞惡性增生，帶有t(11;14) 染色體轉位
6 討論(Discussion)
6.1 Amyloidosis 概論
Amyloidosis 是一群由異常蛋白質以β-sheet 結構沉積於組織的疾病。依據沉積蛋白質來源可
分為：
Type
Protein Source
Associated
Conditions
Cardiac
Involvement
AL
amyloidosis
Immunoglobulin light
chains (kappa or
lambda)
Plasma cell dyscrasia
Multiple myeloma
Waldenström’s
Common, aggressive
ATTR-wt
(wild-type)
Transthyretin
(normal protein)
Age-related (>70
years)
Predominantly male
Common, slowly
progressive
ATTR-v
(variant)
Transthyretin
(mutant protein)
Hereditary
Ethnic predisposition
Variable depending
on mutation
AA
amyloidosis
Serum amyloid A
Chronic inflammation
(RA, IBD, FMF)
Rare


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
6.2 AL Amyloidosis 心臟表現
心臟是AL amyloidosis 最常侵犯且預後最差的器官。典型表現包括：
• Restrictive cardiomyopathy：心室壁增厚但順應性下降，舒張功能受損
• Heart failure with preserved EF (HFpEF)：早期射出分率正常
• Atrial involvement：心房肌肉浸潤導致「stiff atrium syndrome」，即使在竇性節律下也
缺乏有效心房收縮
• Conduction abnormalities：傳導系統浸潤可導致房室阻滯
• Arrhythmias：心房顫動風險增加，且心房內血栓風險高（即使在竇性節律）
6.3 Echocardiographic Features of Cardiac Amyloidosis
• Biventricular wall thickening（雙心室壁增厚）
• Biatrial enlargement（雙心房擴大）
• Speckle-tracking strain with “apical sparing” pattern：心尖部收縮相對保留，基底
部收縮明顯受損
• Granular sparkling appearance of myocardium（心肌閃爍樣外觀）
• Thickened valves（瓣膜增厚）
• Pericardial effusion（心包積液）
• Diminutive A wave on transmitral Doppler（二尖瓣流入A 波減小）
重點提醒
Apical Sparing Pattern：此病患global longitudinal strain 為−10.1%（正常< −19%），
且呈現典型的「cherry on top」或「apical sparing」圖案。此特徵對cardiac amyloidosis
有高度特異性，可與其他造成LV wall thickening 的疾病區分。 6.4 為何HCM 被排除？
Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy
This Patient
Asymmetric septal hypertrophy（典
型）
Concentric wall thickening
High voltage on ECG
Low/decreasing voltage
Positive genetic testing (40–60%)
56-gene panel negative
Family history of HCM/SCD
Family history of heart failure (non-specific)
Gradual progression over years
Rapid 17-month progression
RV involvement rare
RV wall thickening present


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
7 治療計畫(Treatment Plan)
7.1 藥物治療(Medications)
Drug
(Generic)
Dose
Route
Freq
適應症/機轉
Heart Failure Management
Furosemide
Variable
PO/IV
PRN
Loop diuretic
體液過載利尿治療
Spironolactone
25 mg
PO
QD
MRA
利尿及神經荷爾蒙調節
Anticoagulation
Apixaban
Standard
PO
BID
DOAC
心房功能不良血栓預防
（即使竇性節律也需要）
Antiarrhythmic (for subsequent AF)
Amiodarone
Variable
PO
QD
Class III antiarrhythmic
AF 心律控制
準備電燒整流
Chemotherapy: Daratumumab + CyBorD (ANDROMEDA regimen)
Daratumumab
16 mg/kg
IV
Weekly→Q2WAnti-CD38 monoclonal
antibody
標靶漿細胞
Cyclophosphamide300
mg/m2
PO
Weekly
Alkylating agent
抑制漿細胞增生
Bortezomib
1.3 mg/m2
SC
Weekly
Proteasome inhibitor
抑制蛋白酶體，誘導漿細胞凋
亡
Dexamethasone
20–40 mg
PO
Weekly
Corticosteroid
抗漿細胞及抗發炎
7.2 治療原理(Treatment Rationale)
7.2.1 Heart Failure in Cardiac Amyloidosis
• Diuretics：為主要治療，需謹慎平衡前負荷
• Beta-blockers and ACE-inhibitors：傳統心衰竭藥物在cardiac amyloidosis 效果有限
且可能有害（低血壓風險）
• Digoxin：禁忌，因amyloid fibrils 會結合digoxin 增加毒性風險
• Calcium channel blockers：禁忌，會與amyloid fibrils 結合導致嚴重負性肌力作用


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
7.2.2 Anticoagulation
Cardiac amyloidosis 患者即使在竇性節律下也有高血栓風險，因為：
• Atrial infiltration 導致心房收縮功能喪失（mechanical standstill）
• 左心耳血流淤滯
• 建議所有心房受累患者接受抗凝治療
7.2.3 Chemotherapy: ANDROMEDA Trial
ANDROMEDA trial (NEJM 2021) 比較Daratumumab + CyBorD vs CyBorD alone：
• Hematologic complete response: 53.3% vs 18.1% (RR 2.9, P<0.001)
• Survival free from major organ deterioration favored daratumumab (HR 0.58)
• 排除條件：NT-proBNP >8500 pg/mL, SBP <90 mmHg, NYHA IIIb/IV
Treatment Goals in AL Amyloidosis：
1. Hematologic response：Reduce free light chain production
2. Organ response：Prevent further deposition, allow organ recovery
3. Supportive care：Manage heart failure, prevent thromboembolism
目標是達到very good partial response (VGPR) 或complete response (CR)：
dFLC <40 mg/L 或negative immunofixation。 8 病程與預後(Follow-up and Outcome)
• 病患開始接受Daratumumab + CyBorD 化療
• 後續發生atrial fibrillation，開始amiodarone 準備電燒整流
• 持續利尿劑治療及次最大運動
• Outcome：於第三與第四次化療週期之間，病患在夜間於家中發生心跳驟停（cardiac
arrest），無法復甦
重點提醒
Prognosis of Cardiac AL Amyloidosis：心臟侵犯是AL amyloidosis 預後最差的指標。 未治療的中位存活期僅6 個月。即使接受治療，嚴重心臟侵犯的患者仍常死於：
• Progressive heart failure
• Sudden cardiac death（最常見，常與電解質紊亂或PEA 相關）
• Arrhythmias
Prophylactic ICD 在此族群效果不佳，因為猝死常為PEA 而非VT/VF。


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
9 學習重點(Key Takeaways)
重點提醒
1. Clinical Pearl 1: Low voltage-wall thickness mismatch
心室壁增厚但ECG 電壓下降是cardiac amyloidosis 的關鍵線索，應與HCM（電壓通
常增高）區分。 2. Clinical Pearl 2: Kussmaul’s sign indicates restrictive physiology
庫斯莫爾徵是限制性心肌病變的重要理學檢查發現，提示右心室順應性下降。 3. Clinical Pearl 3: Bilateral rotator cuff tears as amyloid clue
雙側旋轉肌袖撕裂是amyloid 沉積於韌帶組織的表現，尤其見於ATTR amyloidosis，
但AL amyloidosis 也可見。 4. Clinical Pearl 4: Hoarseness suggests AL (not ATTR) amyloidosis
聲帶浸潤導致聲音沙啞幾乎僅見於AL amyloidosis，是鑑別AL vs ATTR 的重要線索。 5. Clinical Pearl 5: Complete workup for AL amyloidosis
檢查應包括：SPEP with immunofixation（單純SPEP 可能正常）、serum free light
chains、urine immunofixation。SPEP alone 可漏診約50% 的AL amyloidosis。 6. Clinical Pearl 6: Anticoagulation even in sinus rhythm
Cardiac amyloidosis 患者因心房浸潤導致功能性心房停滯，即使維持竇性節律也需要
抗凝治療。 7. Clinical Pearl 7: Avoid certain medications
Digoxin 和calcium channel blockers 在cardiac amyloidosis 為禁忌，因會與amyloid
fibrils 結合增加毒性或負性肌力作用。 Red Flags for Cardiac Amyloidosis（心臟類澱粉沉積症危險信號）：
當遇到「左心室壁增厚」的病患時，以下特徵應高度懷疑amyloidosis 而非HCM：
1. ECG 低電壓或電壓下降（與壁厚不成比例）
2. 快速進展的症狀（months rather than years）
3. Kussmaul’s sign 或其他限制性生理學表現
4. 雙側腕隧道症候群或旋轉肌袖撕裂病史
5. 不明原因的周邊神經病變
6. Echocardiography 上的apical sparing pattern
7. Cardiac MRI 上的廣泛late gadolinium enhancement 及elevated T1


NEJM Case Record 教學講義
Case 3-2025: AL Amyloidosis
10 參考文獻(References)
1. Dudzinski DM, Pellikka PA. Systemic light chain amyloidosis. N Engl J Med. 2024;391:1165. 2. Pellikka PA, Dudzinski DM, Lubitz SA, et al. Case Records of the Massachusetts General
Hospital (Case 10-2022). N Engl J Med. 2022;386:1266-76. 3. Muchtar E, Blauwet LA, Gertz MA. Restrictive cardiomyopathy: genetics, pathogenesis,
clinical manifestations, diagnosis, and therapy. Circ Res. 2017;121:819-37. 4. Garcia Y, Collins AB, Stone JR. Abdominal fat pad excisional biopsy for the diagnosis and
typing of systemic amyloidosis. Hum Pathol. 2018;72:71-9. 5. Kastritis E, Palladini G, Minnema MC, et al. Daratumumab-based treatment for im-
munoglobulin light-chain amyloidosis. N Engl J Med. 2021;385:46-58. 6. Falk RH. Cardiac amyloidosis: a treatable disease, often overlooked. Circulation. 2011;124:1079-
85. 謝慕揚, MD, PhD, FESC
國立臺灣大學醫學院附設醫院新竹臺大分院
心血管中心
